summary: Completed full backend + frontend testing for Dutyee portfolio site. Backend: 9/9 pytest tests pass covering root, contact CRUD, validation (invalid email, empty name/message, missing fields), and _id leak protection. Frontend: All sections render, routes work (/videos, /articles), contact form submits successfully with success state, WhatsApp/email/LinkedIn hrefs correct, Clash Display font loads, mobile nav toggle works, zero console errors, scroll reveals trigger correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is referenced inside create_contact_message (line 87) but defined at line 114 (module bottom). Works at runtime because logger exists by the time the endpoint is called, but it's fragile code ordering — move logging.basicConfig/getLogger above routes for clarity.

server.py: POST /api/contact wraps validation in a try/except that converts any exception to HTTP 500 — this could mask downstream bugs. Pydantic validation errors are raised before this block so OK, but consider narrower except (PyMongoError) to avoid swallowing unrelated errors.
Email uniqueness/rate-limiting not enforced on contact endpoint — could be spammed. Consider adding basic rate limit or captcha in production.
Home.jsx is a long single-scroll page — sections are separate components already, structure looks clean. No files appear >700 lines (verified visually).
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Contact messages created via tests are prefixed with TEST_ for identification. No cleanup endpoint available, but they remain in db.contact_messages collection for admin review.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py. Actual data-testid names in frontend: Navigation uses nav-videos / nav-articles / nav-contact-cta / nav-mobile-toggle / mobile-menu / site-header. Contact uses contact-whatsapp / contact-email / contact-linkedin / contact-input-name / contact-input-email / contact-input-company / contact-input-message / contact-submit / contact-success / contact-error. Pages: videos-title, videos-grid, video-card-{i}, articles-title, articles-list, article-card-{i}. All routes: /, /videos, /articles.
